playwright_visible.name: Playwright Browser (GUI)
args: export DISPLAY=:0; export XAUTHORITY=${XAUTHORITY:~/.Xauthority}; export WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-0; export XDG_SESSION_TYPE=wayland; export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:/run/user/1000}; exec npx @playwright/mcp@latest --proxy-server http://127.0.0.1:8088 --ignore-https-errors --user-data-dir ${PLAYWRIGHT_VISIBLE_USER_DATA_DIR:~/.mantis-chrome-visible}
